# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

```yaml
name: Build & Deploy Artifacts
on: [push]
jobs:
  deploy_artifacts:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
      
      - name: Set up JDK 1.8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v1
        with:
          java-version: 1.8
      
      - name: Build application
        run: mvn clean install -DskipTests
        
      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: build_artifacts
          path: target/*.jar, src/main/resources/*, deployment_scripts/*
          
      - name: Share Artifacts
        run: |
          echo "Artifacts are available for team members to download at:"
          curl --silent "https://api.github.<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>c
